description:
This quiz assesses proficiency with Regular Expressions, covering basic patterns, quantifiers, grouping, and look‑around assertions. It is moderately challenging, encouraging a supportive, practice‑oriented tone that guides learners toward mastery. The content is concise yet motivating, prompting further exploration of regex skills.
Topics: Regular expression syntax, Quantifiers, Capture groups and non‑capture groups, Look‑ahead and look‑behind assertions, Pattern validation
Audience: Developers, QA engineers, and students with introductory to intermediate experience in programming who want to deepen their regex capabilities.
